title: Crispy Light Moroccan Sea Bass Stir-fry
description: A floral and crispy sea bass dish infused with rich spices from Morocco, perfect for a light meal that's pescatarian-friendly.
instructions: Combine the sea bass with salt in a shallow dish. Marinate for at least 30 minutes, or overnight in the fridge.
Preheat your wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil and swirl to coat evenly.
Add minced garlic to the hot pan and sauté until fragrant but not browned, about 1 minute.
Carefully remove the marinated fish from its marinade with a fork and place it in the pan. Sear for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown on both sides.
Stir in lemon juice, zests, and parsley. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Serve hot with any remaining marinade drizzled over the top.
